brief_justification: Agent arrives at the exact correct answer (C: 0 generators) matching the ground truth; agent merely restates 'exactly as you described' without independently analyzing or extending the cascade logic; no reflection on its own reasoning process or potential pitfalls; agent performs zero independent verification, simply accepting the question's pre-worked arithmetic without re-deriving any step; presents the conclusion as certain with no acknowledgment of assumptions (e.g., proportional load distribution model, instantaneous tripping); no competing scenarios or alternative models considered (e.g., partial load shedding, non-proportional dispatch); agent cites the question's own derivation trail rather than constructing an independent one, offering no reproducible reasoning chain of its own.
